_comment: Declarative manifest for the documentation site (#543, formalised in #545).
Each page is one entry under a section; the section titles become the
sidebar-nav groups. Adding a doc = add one line.
source  (required) repo-relative path to the source file
nav     (required) short label shown in the sidebar
output  (optional) site-relative output filename; derived from source if omitted
The page <title> comes from the source's first H1, not from here.
'exclude' lists repo-root *.md kept off the site on purpose, so the
unlisted-source check can tell 'deliberately omitted' from 'forgotten'.
